title: Advanced IT Tools, Career Prep, and System Management
description:
Updated in May 2025.
 
This course now features Coursera Coach!
 
A smarter way to learn with interactive, real-time conversations that help you test your knowledge, challenge assumptions, and deepen your understanding as you progress through the course.

Unlock the full potential of IT system management and career readiness with this comprehensive course. You'll master advanced Linux tools, dive into disk management and system run levels, and develop expertise in boot processes and storage solutions. From optimizing system performance to enhancing your employability, this course is your gateway to IT mastery.

Your journey begins with a deep dive into Linux system administration, exploring disk partitioning, logical volume management, RAID, and advanced storage tools like Stratis. You'll navigate boot processes, customize system messages, and implement efficient file-sharing solutions using NFS and Samba. The course ensures you're equipped with practical, real-world skills essential for IT professionals.

Transitioning from technical proficiency to career preparation, you'll learn to craft standout resumes, compelling cover letters, and ace interviews tailored for IT and Linux roles. Comprehensive modules on job expectations, certifications, and community engagement will ensure you're well-prepared to enter and thrive in the job market.

Designed for IT enthusiasts and professionals, this course caters to those aiming to advance their Linux expertise and career opportunities. A foundational knowledge of Linux is recommended, making this course ideal for intermediate to advanced learners eager to excel.
